doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document outlines a regulatory scheme that contradicts established California Business and Professions Code restrictions on the unauthorized practice of law and has no basis in actual State Bar of California administrative policy.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document describes a legal framework that would fundamentally conflict with California's strict Unauthorized Practice of Law (UPL) statutes under the Business and Professions Code, and no such protocol exists in State Bar public records.

CONFIDENCE: 95
